# IQRA Rozatul Atfal — ID Card Generator

> Browser-based and desktop tool for designing and printing school ID cards for students and staff, with customizable templates, dynamic fields, barcodes, signatures, and watermarks.

The app lets school administrators compose front and back PVC-sized ID cards, switch between built-in and user-uploaded CSS templates, manage student vs. staff field sets, and export print-ready layouts.

## Pages

- [ID Card Generator](/): Compose, preview, and print student or staff ID cards.
